input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 1.1.5 tests that use org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor/TypedProps will not compile against 2.0.0-M1 because those deprecated classic TypedActor APIs are absent from the 2.0.0-M1 actor jar; this requires test updates, not setup.
pekko-actor-typed_2.13 is a separate module for the newer typed actor API, but it is not required to exercise the target pekko-actor_2.13 artifact meaningfully.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is required: the resolved pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1 artifact only depends on scala-library and com.typesafe:config, and normal classic ActorSystem/Props usage is available directly from the target artifact without Docker, additional Maven modules, or required environment/system properties.
